name: kai-chattr
description: Clean rebuild of chattr — local multi-agent coordination room (web + api), built to the v3 design standard.

scripts.verify-local: pnpm run check:contracts && pnpm run check:deps && pnpm run test:runtime-contract && pnpm run test:port-drift-contract && pnpm run test:no-api-session-contract && pnpm run test:no-supabase-contract && powershell -NoProfile -Command "Set-Location services/api; uv run python -m compileall app -q; uv run pytest -q" && pnpm --dir apps/web run build && pnpm run runtime:probe && pnpm run test:workbench-browser
